author: y4rr
content: Follow-up from Sprint C.7 (#626). GpuBackend methods: broadcast_add_f32/f64, broadcast_sub_f32/f64, broadcast_mul_f32/f64, broadcast_div_f32/f64, broadcast_bmm_f32/f64. Requires stride-aware indexing kernel that maps flat output index to broadcasted input indices. Pattern identical to NumPy broadcast semantics.
